Started this game like 20 days ago and I wanna ask for some advice on what to invest in as a f2p (I haven't put much thought into covs or wods yet, would love some advice there, as well as which enlightens to prioritize). These're my fav three teams and my thoughts on them so far.

helot: Love ghelot so far. was playing her with Leigh till I got Thais and it feels so satisfying (even before I realized you could pull hp from the furnace and was just shredding through hp, lol)

deathstar: I have so much fun decimating story enemies with arachne and I love her design, but I dont think I really have any good supports for her, so I don't see the point of investing too much there yet

tentateam: so far I have the most fun with the aequor mechanics and love this team. Prob my fav of the bunch to play, but I kinda feel like I have too many charas on the team whose rouses are needed for them to be good for the team

My favourite Arachne team is:
Pollux, Castor, Clem/Winkle Arachne.
I'm a Pollux fanboy, but here Arachne is sort of a sub DPS, whilst he does his thing, she slowly ramps up stacks with her 1 costs, and ultra turn deals like, 200k+ in pursuits 
I believe Castor would be a great addition to Ur account, since he's amazing as a unit, and will help you live (Arachne is backend damage: the DPS), so you need to stay alive until the enemy can actually die. That's why I use her with Pollux, he can dish enough damage to reach her execute faster. 
Other than that, she's versatile enough to be played anywhere, really. Outside exalt focused teams.

Pick one that helps u the most

give clem the keyflare gen cov(the baby one, it says that it gives embryo fusion for caro but keyflare for anyone else, it makes her keyflare stonks go up). if you have any hand size wheel, that would probs be nice. you probably want dream of medicine on someone(arachne for eternal loom or horla for extra joy stance can work. there are other viable options too though, like daff for dream of medicine). the cov that gives you an extra defense(white tide smth iirc) can also be great on horla. arachne just wants rm, dmg amp, you could honestly put the cov clem has on her probably, more shields and more pursuit gaming with exalt. i forgor all the names in my head but hope explanation helped a bit. wheel-wise...you're on the right track, there are probably other wods that work but nothing wrong w the ones u have
